title: Royal Blue Satin Ribbon 25mm, 23 Meters Solid Colors Fabric Ribbon for Crafting, Gift Wrapping, Balloons, DIY Sewing Project, Hair Bows and Cake Decoration
features: Premium Ribbon - Each roll is 1" (≈ 25mm) in width and 25 yards(≈23 Meters) in length. It's a smooth surface ribbon made of high-quality single-sided polyester fabric and one side is full of luster. There are 20 colors optional, every color is very bright, it's the best choice for DIY project

Ribbons for Gift Wrapping - These beautiful multi-color ribbons are suitable for all kinds of gift boxes, such as wedding gifts, birthday gifts, holiday gifts, souvenirs, anniversary gifts, etc. They are long enough to be tied into bows and decorate the biscuits, cake, candies packages, add a touch of unique color

Applicable Scenarios - These beautiful single-sided satin ribbons are suitable for decoration of Easter, Halloween, Christmas, Thanksgiving Party, Birthday Party, Gender Reveal Party, Family Gatherings, Weddings, Show, Exhibition, etc. Add a sense of atmosphere to your parties, celebrations, gatherings, events, etc.

Wide Range of Uses - These ribbons for crafts can be used under sewing machines, embroidery machines, knitting machines, so they are not only used for scene layout, bows for gift wrapping, gift box tie, but also DIY into beautiful hair bands, hair accessories, bow hair Rope, balloons decoration, etc. Can be woven into your own unique bridal bracelet, bridesmaid wristband corsage, souvenir strap, brooch, graduation ribbon lei, pet decoration, etc.
Warm Tips - Both ends of the cut single-sided Satin ribbon need to be sealed to prevent fraying and loosening. Just sweep the ends of the ribbon over the candlelight and you're done.
description: Product Description Exquisite Details 1. Surface is smooth and shiny and to be touched giving you a good texture feeling. 2.100% polyester high-quality fabric. 3. Ribbon full of luster and the color is very bright. Many Size Optional: 6mm x 23 Meters 10mm x 23 Meters 20mm x 23 Meters 25mm x 23 Meters 40mm x 23 Meters AHOMAME Ribbon Make Life More Colourful Gift Wrapping - Colorful ribbons are ideal for gift wrapping, such as wedding gifts, birthday gifts, souvenirs, anniversary gifts. They are long enough to be tied into bows and decorate the biscuits, cake, candies packages. DIY Crafting - These ribbons are the best supplies for crafts, can be used under sewing & knitting machines, so they are not only used for gift wrapping but also can be DIY crafting bridal bracelets, bridesmaid wristbands corsage, souvenir straps, graduation ribbon lei, etc. PLEASE NOTE: The ends of the cut ribbons need to be sealed to prevent fraying. 1. Actual color of the ribbon may vary slightly due to differences in weather, light, and monitor display. 2. Please refer to the actual product size and color. 3. Manual measurement, the width may be 1-2MM error. Gift Wrapping Ribbon DIY Crafting Ribbon Bow Making Bouquets Ribbon Wedding Decorations you can use it to decorate your wedding party, such as gift wrapping, wedding invitation, Bridesmaid bouquet, wedding tables, add beautiful colors for your wedding party. Christmas Decorations to decorate Christmas trees, gift package box, Christmas tableware, Christmas garland, Christmas candy bags, DIY Xmas cards, satin ribbon will add a warm Christmas atmosphere. Home Decorations you can use fabric ribbon to decorate your home, such as stairway, tableware, wine bottles, cars, front door wreaths, dream catchers, decorate tapestry, etc.
